content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.40%, Bank Nifty -1.53%, VIX +9.23% to 19.05 — clear risk-off tape. However the existing book is nicely positioned: defensives (NESTLEIND, SUNPHARMA, GOLDBEES), energy beneficiaries (COALINDIA, ONGC), and beat-driven specials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, GLENMARK). Priority is locking in gains via tight SL trails on winners ahead of further volatility, not adding new exposure into a -1.4% session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24020
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.88,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +5.5% with CMP 1037-1045. SL is already at 1029.88 (~0.8% below CMP) which is tight and below intraday support 1038/1029. Holding existing SL — keeping room for normal chop given the stock has run hard but thesis (Q4 beat, NIM expansion, AUM milestone) is intact. No-op; recording HOLD intent."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.7% but thesis (gold safe-haven on Hormuz blockade, INR 94.85, FII outflows, Fed hold) is intact and strengthening. SL 119 is 2.3% below CMP 121.74 — appropriate. Not averaging down, not exiting. Defensive ballast in a risk-off tape is exactly what this position is for."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1442.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +2.8%, CMP 1457.90, SL 1442 (1.1% below CMP). Already at near-breakeven trail — appropriate given HUL Q4 print today is a binary read-through risk. Holding current SL; no-op acknowledged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +2.1%, CMP 1777.30, SL 1762 (0.86% below CMP). SL already trailed close to entry. Q4 FY26 board May 19 is a binary catalyst — keeping current tight SL is appropriate. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +3.2% intraday earlier (CMP 484.45, SL 478, gap 1.3%). SL is already trailed up from entry 469 to 478 (above entry — locking in gain). Stock at fresh 52-wk high on Q4 dividend + crude-substitute thesis. Keeping SL at 478; tighter would risk stop-out on noise. No-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.4%, CMP 197.24, SL 195 (1.1% below CMP). Stock surged +10.6% yesterday on Q4 PAT +68%, sub-1% NNPA, multiple broker upgrades to ₹220. Today's small pullback in -1.5% Bank Nifty tape is acceptable. SL just below entry — risk capped. Letting thesis play."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2400.00,
      "new_target": 2580.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.3%, CMP 2444.90, SL 2400 (1.8% below CMP). Stock at all-time high on Ryaltris US direct-commercialization + Sodium Phosphates launch. SL at entry/breakeven — risk is zero on this trade. Letting it run toward 2580. No-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.2%, CMP 302, SL 290 (4% below). Bullish Marubozu yesterday, Brent ~$118, Hormuz blockade thesis intact. Stock at 52-wk high zone consolidating. SL at 290 gives room for normal volatility. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CHENNPETRO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT 1120 from earlier session — CMP 1142, well above limit. Order will not fill at current levels and stock has gapped up on Q4 (PAT +202.6%, dividend ₹54). Letting it sit; if the stock pulls back to 1120 the entry is still valid. Not stacking a duplicate at higher price (ORDER HYGIENE rule) and not chasing a stock at 52-wk high in -1.4% Nifty tape."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already held at 200 — not adding. Watchlist exit only."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.88,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1029.88 (~0.8% below CMP 1037-1045) sits just below intraday S1 1038 / S2 1029. Tighter would risk stop-out on noise; looser breaks the per-position risk budget. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Safe-haven thesis intact and strengthening on Hormuz/INR/FII risk-off. SL 119 = 2.3% below CMP — appropriate. Not averaging down at -2.7%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1442.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1442 already at +2.1% above entry, locking in gain. HUL Q4 today is binary read-through risk — keeping current tight SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +1.6% above entry, trailing tight. Q4 May 19 is binary catalyst; current SL appropriately defensive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "reasoning": "SL trailed from entry 469 to 478 (locking in +1.9% gain). Gap to CMP 484 is 1.3% — tight but defensible at 52-wk high. Not tightening further to avoid noise stop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 195.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 195 = 1.1% below CMP, just below entry 200. Q4 catalyst + broker upgrades to 220 intact. Letting thesis play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2400.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry 2400 = breakeven trail. ATH thesis on US direct commercialization intact. Risk is zero, leaving room to run to 2580."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 290.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 290 = 4% below CMP, gives room for normal Brent-headline volatility. Bullish Marubozu yesterday + Hormuz thesis intact. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK already held — no new add at +13% extended. CHENNPETRO/ONGC: pending order on CHENNPETRO at 1120 covers refinery exposure if pullback comes; not adding more upstream/refinery names with held ONGC + COALINDIA already covering the energy theme (cluster discipline). GESHIP, GLENMARK fresh adds: GLENMARK already held. ITC, RELIANCE, BAJFINANCE, HUL: passing — risk-off tape with VIX +9%, defensives running into earnings (HUL today, BAJFIN already reported), no edge for fresh entry. Watching CHENNPETRO 1120 fill, GESHIP for pullback to 1480-1500 zone if Q4 May 8 bid sustains.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-positioned for the current regime: 8 holdings spanning gold safe-haven (GOLDBEES), defensive FMCG (NESTLEIND), pharma defensives (SUNPHARMA, GLENMARK), energy/crude beneficiaries (COALINDIA, ONGC), housing-finance turnaround (PNBHOUSING), banking turnaround (BANDHANBNK). Deployed 50% with 50% cash dry powder — ample given VIX spike. Soft target deployed is 80% but with VIX +9% and Nifty -1.4%, sitting on cash here is opportunity-aware, not theater. 5-day track is rough (win rate 11%, profit factor 0.2x, -₹6,095) — the right discipline now is to let winners (NESTLE, COALINDIA, GLENMARK, PNBHOUSING) compound under tight SLs rather than churn. No new entries today. Three pending OPEN orders (CHENNPETRO, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) — leaving them unmodified; if filled at limit, allocations remain reasonable. Cluster check: held has 1 banking (BANDHAN), 2 energy (ONGC, COALINDIA — distinct: upstream + coal), 1 HFC (PNBHOUSING) — within discipline."
}
